introSection: Ortobruco (Italian for Garden Caterpillar) is a kiddie roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. It is a unique ride built by Pinfari. It opened in 1990.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and multicolored supports. The ride opened with green track and supports, but was repainted for the 2017 season.

fullText:
Ortobruco (Italian for Garden Caterpillar) is a kiddie roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. It is a unique ride built by Pinfari. It opened in 1990.



Yellow track and multicolored supports. The ride opened with green track and supports, but was repainted for the 2017 season.
